# Contributing to `munki-mscp-generator`
We love contributions to `munki-mscp-generator`, and it's super exciting when folks want to contribute bugfixes or new features.
To make reviewing and merging these changes a little easier for us, we ask that you stick to the following guidelines when opening a new pull request:

## Guidelines
* One pull request per feature/bugfix.
  * This makes it easier for us to review changes, and understand the scope of what it is you're trying to do.
* Provide examples of why a new feature is beneficial
  * We love hearing about new or different use-cases for `munki-mscp-generator` - if you're running into friction that made you want to open a PR, please share more about it!
  * This also gives us a better understanding of what you're trying to achieve, and why this is important to you.
* We discourage AI pull requests. Please always fully disclose any ways in which AI was used, including code generation, edits, evaluation, testing, and summarising. 
  * It is hard to evaluate why a pull request is important to you if this is not described by a person.
  * We are taking the time to manually read, evaluate, and test every line of code being changed. It is not fair on our time if we are the first person to do so.
  * If a pull request is even partially AI generated, disclosure allows us to evaluate to what extent we can rely on contributors for feature maintenance.

Thank you for contributing!
